# Hi, I'm Peter Kamau

## About Me
Telecommunications Engineering graduate with a strong interest in technology and problem-solving. Currently focused on building practical skills through hands-on development work.

---

## What I Have Been Doing

### Version Control & Collaboration
- Managing code repositories using Git and GitHub
- Creating commits, working with branches, and handling pull requests
- Pushing code changes and collaborating with others on shared projects
- Learning the fundamentals of collaborative software development workflows

### Documentation
- Writing clear project documentation using Markdown
- Structuring README files and technical notes for readability

### Web Development
- Building web page structure with HTML
- Styling layouts and components with CSS
- Adding interactivity and dynamic behavior with JavaScript
